description_long: This is a pixel-art style semi-automatic handgun with a rectangular slide and a slightly contoured grip. The frame and slide are colored in olive drab green, with black accents on the grip, trigger, and rear slide serrations. The handgun features a squared-off trigger guard and a visible front and rear sight, both highlighted in red for quick target acquisition. The grip is ergonomically shaped with subtle finger grooves and a stippled texture for improved handling. The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present on the slide or frame.
description: A pixel-art semi-automatic handgun with an olive drab slide and contoured, stippled grip, featuring red-highlighted sights and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the contoured grip, squared trigger guard, and red sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular slide, red front and rear sights, and the slim profile of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the grip texture, trigger guard, and slide details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, squared-off slide, and the red front sight post.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with subtle finger grooves and a stippled texture, providing a secure and comfortable hold. It is colored in olive drab with black accenting, and the stippling pattern covers the main gripping surfaces. The backstrap is slightly arched, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a moderate thickness and a flat front edge, offering a modern tactical look. It is integrated smoothly into the frame, with no visible undercuts or accessory rails, and lacks any additional texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and has a simple, unadorned exterior profile. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the olive drab color of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain, with only the pixel-art representation of rear serrations for grip.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the design is simple and functional.
